overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a stone corridor toward a temple complex during golden hour. The scene transitions from a narrow enclosed passage to an open plaza with other NPCs and horses passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor leading to temple district

events.description: mounted guard on horse passes by on the right side of the corridor
pedestrian walks past on the left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow stone corridor toward the distant temple obelisk

notable_agents.action: riding a horse through the corridor, passing the player character on the right
walking in the opposite direction, passing close to the player on the left

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall with hieroglyphic carvings and small niches
tall stone wall with arched doorways and decorative columns
tall obelisk and temple pylon visible at the end of the stone corridor
ancient stone paving slabs with patches of grass growing between cracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor flanked by high ancient walls, heading toward a distant temple obelisk visible in the golden sunlight. A mounted guard passes by on the right, and pedestrians walk in the opposite direction along the weathered stone pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor exit with widening walls approaching open plaza

events.description: second horse and rider pass closely on the right side
exiting the narrow corridor into the open temple plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor as the walls open up and the temple approaches

notable_agents.action: riding a horse past the player, moving toward the plaza entrance

entered.detail: large stone statue of a figure on a pedestal along the right corridor wall
decorative fabric banners suspended between poles in the approaching plaza

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the corridor exit, the stone walls recede and a large wall statue becomes visible on the right. The temple structure grows larger in the frame while decorative banners mark the entrance to the open plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple plaza with ceremonial braziers and market stalls

events.description: horse and rider pass by on the left side of the plaza
character continues walking forward into the plaza, approaching the temple columns

agents.ego_description: walking into the open plaza, approaching the temple complex with other pedestrians and mounted riders around

notable_agents.action: riding a horse across the plaza from left to right in the foreground

entered.detail: tall ceremonial bronze brazier with flames on a decorated stand
wooden market stalls with fabric canopies and hanging goods
large stone statue on a pedestal in the open plaza area
ornate columns at the temple entrance with hieroglyphic carvings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza filled with market stalls, ceremonial braziers, and scattered pedestrians. The temple facade with its detailed columns dominates the view ahead as the character continues walking across the paved plaza while horses pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched temple plaza. It begins with the character walking between high ancient walls under golden light, passing a mounted guard and pedestrians on a weathered stone pavement. As the character approaches the exit, the walls recede to reveal a large wall statue and decorative banners that signal the transition to an open space. The scene then expands as the character emerges into a wide plaza filled with market stalls and ceremonial braziers, with the massive temple facade and its detailed columns dominating the horizon. Finally, the camera continues forward across the paved expanse, weaving through scattered pedestrians and passing horses.
